evidence.title: FIFA official page capture: 2026 World Cup Final Draw start time
evidence.source_description: Official FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Draw page located through web search during defendant merits investigation
evidence.relevance: Establishes the official Final Draw start time as 12:00 local time on December 5, 2025, which helps compare the draw event period against the GovInfo transcript note that the reporter exchange occurred at 11:13 a.m.

evidence.title: YouTube metadata capture: Trump Talks Cristiano Ronaldo at FIFA Draw
evidence.source_description: Public YouTube watch page metadata and description captured by web search and curl during plaintiff merits investigation
evidence.relevance: Provides a public clip source and page metadata asserting that at the FIFA World Cup Draw Ceremony Trump shared a story about meeting Cristiano Ronaldo and said Ronaldo was a great person; relevant to the alleged Ronaldo utterance, though weaker than an official full transcript or video.

evidence.title: GovInfo official transcript capture: Remarks in an Exchange With Reporters Prior to the FIFA World Cup Draw
evidence.source_description: GovInfo / Compilation of Presidential Documents official HTML transcript; fetched with curl and checked against web.open lines during defendant merits investigation
evidence.relevance: Official transcript identifies the relevant Trump remarks as an exchange with reporters prior to the 2026 FIFA World Cup Draw; it includes the Ronaldo utterances and timing/correction notes, directly bearing on whether the utterances were during the countable event period.

evidence.title: Official White House video page capture: President Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing
evidence.source_description: Official White House video page; retrieved by web open/fetch during plaintiff merits investigation
evidence.relevance: Establishes that the White House officially published a video page titled President Trump Attends the FIFA World Cup Drawing, dated December 5, 2025, with a full-video link and related World Cup Draw videos; relevant to source chain and event context.
